rationale: clauses: independent-verdict-required(✓ FA-5 unreviewed detected), blocks-unfaithful(✓ FA-2), blocks-partial(✓ FA-3 via uncovered clause), blocks-stale(✓ FA-4 wrong hash); asserts only FA-1 is faithful and _faithfulness_messages emits a blocker for each of the other four. A gate that passed any non-faithful state would fail the bucket or blocking assertions.
